replies.msg: 你要好熟data workflows, internal controls procedures, costing, 又要直接同CFO做野, 轉數要快, excel要超勁, 最好識VBA, 不停有ad hoc野做, 如果唔係唔使收工, 一份report可以整4個versions (for Board, Operation, CFO, accounting dept), 學到勁多野, 但頭個幾年會好辛苦; 要不停問其他dept拎資料, 但有好多錯野要自己filter, 同時做actual, next month projection and budgeting, 好易亂同錯, 辛苦幾年你會比其他人知得多同闊, 比internal做consol既同事(CPA)辛苦好多, 因為無slack season, 同埋你會知好多senior management做決策既原因/(or無理), management accounting算係唔係big 4出身的CPA另一條出路

Contract Assistant Finance Manager II
[Salary: HK$30,790 to HK$63,950 plus 10% Year-end Incentive Payment]
Main Responsibilities
To perform professional duties such as financial accounting, cost and management accounting,
development/implementation/use of financial system (including Enterprise Resource Planning system),
investigatory accounting and loan/ fund management. Successful candidates will be subject to posting to
different finance fields when required.
Entry Requirements
(i) (a) A Hong Kong Bachelor Degree in Accountancy, or equivalent; or
(b) A member of the Hong Kong Institute of Certified Public Accountants (HKICPA), or equivalent
professional bodies;
(ii) Level 2 (“Grade E” before 2007) or above in Chinese Language and English Language (“Syllabus B”
before 2007) in the Hong Kong Diploma of Secondary Education Examination (HKDSEE) or Hong
Kong Certificate of Education Examination (HKCEE), or equivalent;
(iii) with at least 2 years’ relevant working experience;
(iv) proficient in Microsoft Excel, Words and PowerPoint; and
(v) self-motivated and have strong analytical ability and good interpersonal skills.
Note 1: Applicants possessing both the academic and professional qualifications as stipulated in (i)(a) & (b)
would be advantageous.
Note 2: Written skills of candidates will be assessed during the interview.
